touches.ai_summary: Cold outreach to Jude Stern at CoreSpark. Rep introduced AskElephant's conversation intelligence platform. Jude expressed interest in solving coaching visibility issues across their sales team and agreed to a qualification call.

questions_asked.question: Are you currently recording and analyzing sales calls?
questions_asked.answer: We record but don't have a systematic way to coach from them

next_steps: Schedule 15-minute qualification call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call with Jude Stern. Discussed current pain points around inconsistent coaching and lack of call analytics. CoreSpark has 29 revenue team members who would benefit. Jude confirmed budget authority exists and timeline is Q2. Progressing to discovery.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the urgency to solve this now?
questions_asked.answer: Our new CRO wants better visibility into pipeline quality and rep performance

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing tech stack?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with major CRMs and conferencing tools

next_steps: Jude to share current tech stack details
Schedule discovery call to dive deeper into use cases

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Jude. Explored specific coaching workflows and identified key pain points: reps not following methodology, managers spending hours reviewing calls manually, no way to surface winning patterns. Discussed team size (29 seats) and desired outcomes around rep ramp time and win rate improvement.

questions_asked.question: How are managers currently coaching from calls?
questions_asked.answer: Manually listening to recordings when they have time, which is rare

questions_asked.question: What does implementation typically look like?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks including integrations and initial training

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this?
questions_asked.answer: Our CRO Benjamin Wright will need to sign off, but I'll drive the evaluation

objections: We need to make sure this doesn't create extra work for reps
next_steps: Jude to map out current coaching process in detail
Rep to send over integration requirements doc

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email recapping discovery discussion. Shared integration documentation and customer case study from similar-sized SaaS company that reduced ramp time by 40%. Confirmed next call to review technical requirements.
next_steps: Jude to review case study and tech docs before next call

touches.ai_summary: Second discovery call focused on technical requirements and success metrics. Jude shared that they use Salesforce, Gong for some recordings, and Zoom. Want to consolidate on one platform. Discussed automation tier and confirmed unlimited automation package would fit their scaling plans. Identified KPIs: reduce manager coaching time by 50%, improve new hire ramp by 30%.

questions_asked.question: How does your automation differ from the professional tier?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited includes custom playbooks, automated scorecards, and API access for custom workflows

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision?
questions_asked.answer: We'd like to have something in place by end of Q2, so next 6-8 weeks

next_steps: Schedule demo for Jude and key sales managers
Jude to introduce CRO for executive alignment

touches.ai_summary: Call to finalize demo attendees and agenda. Jude confirmed Benjamin Wright (CRO) will attend as executive sponsor. Also adding two frontline sales managers. Discussed specific workflows to showcase: deal review automation, coaching conversation starters, and win/loss pattern analysis.

questions_asked.question: Can you show us how the coaching insights actually get surfaced to managers?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, we'll walk through the manager dashboard and automated alerts

questions_asked.question: Are there any specific concerns Benjamin has that we should address in the demo?
questions_asked.answer: He's focused on ROI and wants to see how this ties to revenue outcomes

next_steps: Send demo agenda to all attendees
Prepare ROI analysis for Benjamin

touches.ai_summary: Full product demo with Jude, Benjamin Wright (CRO), and two sales managers. Walked through call recording, AI-generated coaching insights, playbook enforcement, and automated deal risk scoring. Benjamin engaged heavily on ROI metrics and competitive differentiation. Team responded positively to automation capabilities and manager workflow efficiency. Consensus to move forward with technical evaluation.

questions_asked.question: How quickly do the AI insights become available after a call?
questions_asked.answer: Typically within 2-3 minutes of the call ending

questions_asked.question: What's the accuracy of your sentiment and objection detection?
questions_asked.answer: Our models achieve 92% accuracy, and you can tune thresholds to your methodology

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the coaching frameworks to our sales methodology?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, the unlimited tier includes fully customizable playbooks and scorecards

objections: We need to ensure data privacy compliance for call recordings
next_steps: Set up technical evaluation trial with 5 pilot users
Share security and compliance documentation
Schedule check-in for end of trial period

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation review call. Pilot group tested platform for two weeks with real calls. Feedback was strong: managers loved automated insights, reps appreciated specific coaching vs vague feedback. Discussed minor integration questions around Salesforce field mapping. Jude confirmed they're ready to move to proposal stage and wants to include all 29 revenue team members.

questions_asked.question: Can we map custom Salesforce fields to your deal analysis?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we support custom field mapping through our Salesforce integration

questions_asked.question: Did the trial surface any concerns or gaps we should address?
questions_asked.answer: No major issues, team wants to know about ongoing training and support

questions_asked.question: What does your customer success model look like post-launch?
questions_asked.answer: Dedicated CSM, quarterly business reviews, and 24/7 technical support on this tier

next_steps: Prepare proposal for 29 seats, unlimited automation tier
Include implementation timeline and support model
Schedule proposal review call

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Jude. Presented pricing at $25,000 ACV for 29 seats with unlimited automation. Walked through implementation plan (3 weeks), training schedule, and success metrics tracking. Jude appreciated the structure and confirmed budget alignment. Asked about contract flexibility and payment terms.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on contract length?
questions_asked.answer: We offer both annual and multi-year options, with better pricing on multi-year

questions_asked.question: Does the $25K pricing work within your approved budget?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have budget allocated, just need to finalize terms with finance

next_steps: Jude to review with Benjamin and finance team
Follow up on payment terms preferences
Schedule pricing discussion if needed

touches.ai_summary: Email follow-up to proposal call. Attached formal proposal document, ROI calculator based on their metrics, and customer references from similar companies. Confirmed rep is available for any questions from finance or legal teams.
next_steps: Jude to circulate proposal internally
Schedule follow-up after internal review

touches.ai_summary: Pricing discussion with Jude. Finance team requested quarterly payment terms instead of annual upfront. Also asked about seat flexibility if they hire additional reps mid-contract. Discussed true-up process and confirmed quarterly payments are acceptable with standard terms. Jude indicated they're close to final approval.

questions_asked.question: What happens if we add more seats mid-year?
questions_asked.answer: We pro-rate additional seats and true-up at renewal, or you can add capacity quarterly

questions_asked.question: Are there any other items finance needs addressed?
questions_asked.answer: Just the payment terms, everything else looks good

next_steps: Send updated proposal with quarterly payment terms
Jude to get final sign-off from Benjamin

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call focused on contract terms. Legal team requested data processing addendum and minor liability cap adjustments. Discussed data retention policies and confirmed standard DPA covers their requirements. Both sides aligned on path to signature within a week.

questions_asked.question: Can you accommodate our standard liability cap?
questions_asked.answer: Let me check with our legal team, what's the cap you're requesting?

next_steps: Rep to review legal requests with internal team
Send redlined contract with agreed changes
Target signature by end of week

touches.ai_summary: Final pricing and terms alignment call. Resolved liability cap at 12 months fees, finalized data processing addendum language, and confirmed quarterly payment schedule starting on contract signature. Jude confirmed Benjamin has approved final terms and legal is preparing signature. Discussed implementation kickoff timing for following week.

questions_asked.question: What's the target signature date?
questions_asked.answer: We're aiming for Friday, legal just needs final redlines from you

questions_asked.question: When can we start implementation?
questions_asked.answer: We can kick off the Monday after signature with your team

next_steps: Send final contract with agreed redlines
Jude to route for signature
Schedule implementation kickoff

touches.ai_summary: Email with final contract documents incorporating all agreed terms: 29 seats, $25,000 ACV, unlimited automation tier, quarterly payments, 12-month liability cap, and standard DPA. Confirmed implementation team is ready to start following Monday. Thanked Jude for partnership through evaluation process.
next_steps: Await signed contract
Implementation kickoff scheduled for following Monday
